style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="ELT Pipeline

1. Extract (extract.py)
 → Load CSV from HuggingFace
 → Parse nested JSON
 → Data validation

2. Load (load.py)
 → Create raw_reports table
 → Bulk insert data

3. Transform (transform.py)
 → Build dimensions
 → Create fact table
 → Generate views" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="210" x="40" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="api-component" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="FastAPI Application

• JWT Authentication
 → Token generation
 → Token validation
 → Role-based access

• Route Handlers
 → Request validation
 → Business logic
 → Response formatting

• Database Connection
 → Connection pooling
 → Query execution
 → Result mapping" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="210" x="270" y="780" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="ai-component" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="AI NLP Engine

• Query Classification
 → Keyword detection
 → Intent recognition
 → Mode selection

• SQL Generation
 → Schema context
 → Query construction
 → Validation

• Response Formatting
 → Data presentation
 → Explanation generation" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="200" width="210" x="500" y="781" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="dashboard-component" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;strokeColor=#666666;fontSize=9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="Streamlit Dashboard

• Page Routing
 → Navigation system
 → Page rendering

• Data Visualization
 → Plotly charts
 → Interactive filters
 → Real-time updates

• Direct DB Access
 → No API dependency
 → View queries
 → Data caching" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="210" x="40" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="security-component" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#ffe6cc;strokeColor=#d79b00;fontSize=9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="Security Layer

• JWT Authentication
 → HS256 algorithm
 → 30-minute expiry
 → Secure secret key

• RBAC Implementation
 → Admin: Full access
 → Customer: Own data only
 → Decorator-based checks

• Data Isolation
 → Query filtering
 → Organization-based" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="190" width="210" x="270" y="1000" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tech-stack-title" parent="1" style="text;html=1;strokeColor=none;fillColor=none;align=left;verticalAlign=middle;whiteSpace=wrap;rounded=0;fontSize=16;fontStyle=1;fontColor=#1a5490;" value="Technology Stack" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="30" width="250" x="40" y="1230" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="tech-stack" parent="1" style="rounded=1;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;fillColor=#d5e8d4;strokeColor=#82b366;fontSize=9;align=left;verticalAlign=top;spacingLeft=8;spacingTop=4;" value="Core Technologies

• Python 3.8+
• FastAPI (REST API)
• Streamlit (Dashboard)
• DuckDB (Analytics DB)
• OpenAI GPT-4o-mini (AI)
• Plotly (Visualization)
• Pandas (Data Processing)
• Python-Jose (JWT)
• Passlib (Password Hashing)
• Uvicorn (ASGI Server)" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="160" width="210" x="40" y="1270" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="legend-box" parent="1" div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe center; justify-content: unsafe center; width: 698px; height: 1px; padding-top: 20px; margin-left: 271px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: center; color: #000000;

div.div:
ELT Pipeline
1. Extract (extract.py)
→ Load CSV from HuggingFace
→ Parse nested JSON
→ Data validation
2. Load (load.py)
→ Create raw_reports table
→ Bulk insert data
3. Transform (transform.py)
→ Build dimensions
→ Create fact table
→ Generate views

div.div:
FastAPI Application
• JWT Authentication
→ Token generation
→ Token validation
→ Role-based access
• Route Handlers
→ Request validation
→ Business logic
→ Response formatting
• Database Connection
→ Connection pooling
→ Query execution
→ Result mapping

AI NLP Engine
• Query Classification
→ Keyword detection
→ Intent recognition
→ Mode selection
• SQL Generation
→ Schema context
→ Query construction
→ Validation
• Response Formatting
→ Data presentation
→ Explanation generation

div.div:
Streamlit Dashboard
• Page Routing
→ Navigation system
→ Page rendering
• Data Visualization
→ Plotly charts
→ Interactive filters
→ Real-time updates
• Direct DB Access
→ No API dependency
→ View queries
→ Data caching

div.style: display: flex; align-items: unsafe flex-start; justify-content: unsafe flex-start; width: 200px; height: 1px; padding-top: 1001px; margin-left: 250px;
box-sizing: border-box; font-size: 0; text-align: left; color: #000000;
display: inline-block; font-size: 9px; font-family: Helvetica; color: light-dark(#000000, #ffffff); line-height: 1.2; pointer-events: all; white-space: normal; word-wrap: normal;

div.div:
Security Layer
• JWT Authentication
→ HS256 algorithm
→ 30-minute expiry
→ Secure secret key
• RBAC Implementation
→ Admin: Full access
→ Customer: Own data only
→ Decorator-based checks
• Data Isolation
→ Query filtering
→ Organization-based

div.div:
Core Technologies
• Python 3.8+
• FastAPI (REST API)
• Streamlit (Dashboard)
• DuckDB (Analytics DB)
• OpenAI GPT-4o-mini (AI)
• Plotly (Visualization)
• Pandas (Data Processing)
• Python-Jose (JWT)
• Passlib (Password Hashing)
• Uvicorn (ASGI Server)
